name: BATTLE OF MIDWAY
description:
BATTLE OF MIDWAY

June 4th 1942

The battle of Midway was a historical moment in World War II between the IJN [Imperial Japanese Navy] and the USN [United States Navy] this battle proved that aircraft carriers were the dominant ships when it came to naval combat, historically the IJN took major hits from the battle loosing their carriers Akagi / Kaga / Soryu / Hiryu.

Marking a devastating lost to the IJN fleet which would grant American access to launch their Island hopping campaign along the pacific islands.

———

UNITED STATES OF AMERICA [USN]

Scenario 1—Hornets Nest

[Play on the side of the USN]

—————————————

EMPIRE OF JAPAN [IJN]

Scenario 2—Red Samurai

[Play on the side of the IJN]

—————

Creators Note: the data of this chatbot was created with sources of the Battle of Midway... however there are some good chances the AI will completely forget the functional tokens and not operate properly, so please suspect the fact that you will end up regenerating alot of messages... its not 100% said to happen but its possible and likely to happen alot.
